name: Pharaonic Essentials
description: Giza plateau with pyramid interiors, Saqqara and Dahshur — the ancient-Egypt core, optimized for three days.

name: Museum Grand Tour
description: The Grand Egyptian Museum, Tahrir, NMEC and Cairo's house museums across two full days.

name: Alexandria Day Trip
description: Qaitbay, the Catacombs, the Roman Amphitheatre and more — one packed Mediterranean day.

name: Islamic & Coptic Cairo
description: Mosques, churches, palaces and bazaars of historic Cairo over two days.

name: Egypt on a Budget
description: Two days of the best free and low-cost sights — proof you don't need a big budget.

name: The Grand Week
description: Five days, everything worth seeing: Giza, Saqqara, the museums, historic Cairo and Alexandria.
